**Aniline HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: carried over from input file (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz), not re-optimized at this level (single point). SCF converged in 9 cycles.

HOMO = -5.554 eV, LUMO = -0.249 eV → **gap ≈ 5.3048 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Files: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2quca6ab/live.json`. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --solvent none --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2quca6ab/live.json`. 

Warnings: ['common header present', "headline field 'homo_lumo_gap_eV' = 5.304817651372075 (present and numeric)"]
